acceptance.item: digital output labels DQ1/DQ2 read correctly
acceptance.note: Graph asserted DO1/DO2 (and terminals CN6:DO1/CN6:DO2) for the printed DQ1/DQ2; DQCOM is correct. Caught by exact_label_mismatch + confident_misread.

Graph put RS422 on CN3 (the 1Vpp A/B/I encoder connector). RS422 belongs to CN4/PTO -> remote ATV340 PTI. Caught by incorrect_connector_ownership; the bare CN3 target also dangles (dangling_reference).

acceptance.item: per-variant braking topology (S1&S2 vs S3) kept distinct
acceptance.note: Graph merged one path [CN9:PA/+, CN9:PC/-, CN10:PB, CN10:PBe, resistor]. S1&S2 brake = CN10 PBe<->PB; S3 = CN9 PA/+ <-> CN8 PB; PC/- is DC-bus, in neither. Caught by incompatible_functional_path (forbidden PC/-, PA/+) + variant_crossover (S1S2 x dc_bus).
Graph carries unqualified duplicate ids M, CN9:PA/+, CN9:PC/- (S1/S2 vs S3). Need S1S2:M / S3:M etc. Caught by duplicate_identifier.

acceptance.item: off-page references are electrical, not pagination
acceptance.note: Graph modeled the footer '1/2' as an off_page_reference '2/2'. Caught by off_page_from_pagination.
Graph used AI2+/AI2- (ordering nit; the terminals are CORRECT). The LLM judge falsely flagged this as a hallucination -- a JUDGE error (PR4 §10.6), NOT a graph defect. Correctly NOT gated here.

hard_failures: exact_label_mismatch: printed DQ1/DQ2 read as DO1/DO2
incorrect_connector_ownership: RS422 on CN3, not CN4
incompatible_functional_path: DC-bus PC/- merged into the brake loop
variant_crossover: S1&S2 and dc-bus/S3 braking conflated in one path
dangling_reference: RS422 link targets undefined CN3
summary: The defective ATV340 graph reads its tags with decent accuracy (score 74/100 -- package, structure, device, and wire categories are strong) yet is structurally UNSAFE to import. Six deterministic gates fire; every P0 electrical error is verified against the rendered NVE97896-02 sheet 1/2 (durable spec section 3). This is the negative calibration anchor: good prose (74) does NOT imply a trustworthy graph (import_verdict=FAIL). The +AI2/-AI2 item is deliberately NOT a defect -- it is a judge false-flag fixed in PR4. truth_status=draft_llm_authored: awaiting Mike's review-and-freeze before this benchmark blocks CI (PRD 10.7).
